ddls:
CREATE TABLE "text_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text sample */,
  "correct" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the text sample is correct */,
  "sentence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the sentence in terms of the number of words */,
  "num_relations" INTEGER /* Number of relations in the text sample */,
  "token_distance" INTEGER /* Token distance between entities in the text sample */,
  "char_distance" INTEGER /* Character distance between entities in the text sample */,
  "variability" REAL /* Variability score of the text sample */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the text sample was analyzed */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the text sample */,
  "text_content" TEXT /* The actual text content of the sample */,
  "language" TEXT /* The language of the text sample */,
  "domain" TEXT /* The domain or category of the text sample */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the text sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_samples_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., document, report, user input) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or path to the source document */,
  "source_version" TEXT /* Version of the source document */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, reviewer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* The user's position or role in the company */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text sample being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., error, suggestion) */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the annotation */,
  "severity" TEXT /* The severity level of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES text_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corrections" (
  "correction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correction */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text sample being corrected */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the correction */,
  "correction_type" TEXT /* Type of correction (e.g., grammatical, logical) */,
  "original_text" TEXT /* Original text before correction */,
  "corrected_text" TEXT /* Corrected text */,
  "correction_date" TEXT /* Date when the correction was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the correction */,
  "reason" TEXT /* The reason for the correction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corrections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corrections_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES text_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text sample being changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., annotation, correction) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the change */,
  "version" TEXT /* The version of the text sample after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_history_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES text_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text sample being measured */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., sentence_length, variability) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* The unit of the metric */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* The category of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_metrics_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES text_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, review) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the role assignment */,
  "expires_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the text sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the text sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the text sample */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the text sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES text_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the machine learning model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model result */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text sample being analyzed */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model used */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Prediction made by the model */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was generated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the result */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* The status of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES text_samples ("sample_id")
)
